'''ponazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vegansexual|vegansexual]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vegansexual|vegansexual]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ponazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || ponazithi || ponaziji || ponazishi || ponaziki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || ponazuthu || ponazuju || ponazushu || ponazuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || ponazuthu || ponazuju || ponazushu || ponazuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || ponazufthuf || ponazufjuf || ponazufshuf || ponazufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || ponazethe || ponazeje || ponazeshe || ponazeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || ponazotho || ponazojo || ponazosho || ponazoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || ponazotho || ponazojo || ponazosho || ponazoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || ponazofthof || ponazofjof || ponazofshof || ponazofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ponazïfthïf || ponazïfjïf || ponazïfshïf || ponazïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ponazïfthïf || ponazïfjïf || ponazïfshïf || ponazïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ponazïfthïf || ponazïfjïf || ponazïfshïf || ponazïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ponazïfthïf || ponazïfjïf || ponazïfshïf || ponazïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || ponazæthæ || ponazæjæ || ponazæshæ || ponazækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || ponazatha || ponazaja || ponazasha || ponazaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || ponazatha || ponazaja || ponazasha || ponazaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || ponazafthaf || ponazafjaf || ponazafshaf || ponazafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || ponazasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || ponazshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || ponazroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || ponazmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || ponazyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goponaznkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goponaznkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goponaznkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goponaznkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || ponanazasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || ponanazshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || ponanazroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || ponanazmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || ponanazyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goponanaznkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goponanaznkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goponanaznkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goponanaznkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || penæzasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || penæzshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || penæzroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || penæzmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || penæzyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gopenæznkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gopenæznkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gopenæznkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gopenæznkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || ponfazasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || ponfazshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || ponfazroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || ponfazmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || ponfazyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goponfaznkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goponfaznkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goponfaznkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goponfaznkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
